items.hook: 可以先帮你把这一步收窄下来。
items.bridge: 二手车门店预约里，先弄清预算、用车场景和时间，比直接回一个能不能看更有用。
items.next_step: Ask for budget, use case, preferred time, and whether this is a first visit.
items.handoff_suggestion: Route to Catcher if the user replies with visit facts.

items.hook: 第一次来看先想清楚适不适合，本来就很正常。
items.bridge: 很多第一次接触二手车的人，不是需要更多选项，而是需要先知道自己更适合哪条路线、预算和场景该怎么对上。
items.next_step: Acknowledge the uncertainty and ask what budget or use case matters most plus the time window.
items.handoff_suggestion: Route to Catcher if the user shares route and timing.

items.hook: 我们可以先从你的时间点往回看。
items.bridge: 返乡、入职和换车节点快到时，日期、可来的时段和当前用车问题，比先讲一大堆车更关键。
items.next_step: Ask when the deadline is, when the user can come in, and what they most want to solve.
items.handoff_suggestion: Route to Catcher once the user shares timing facts.

items.hook: 我可以先把价格问题变得更有参考性一点。
items.bridge: 二手车价格很多时候取决于预算、年份、配置和场景，所以先收窄是家用、通勤、首台车还是新能源，会更有帮助。
items.next_step: Ask whether the user is mainly asking about family use, commute, first car, or new-energy direction.
items.handoff_suggestion: Route to Catcher if the user shares scope.

items.hook: 欢迎你再回来接上这一段。
items.bridge: 对回来的客户来说，最重要的不是从零重聊，而是先知道这次想接着看哪一类、解决哪个卡点。
items.next_step: Ask what has changed since the last visit and when they hope to come in.
items.handoff_suggestion: Route to FollowUp or Catcher depending on the user's reply.

items.hook: 这类担心可以慢一点说，不用急着给自己定性。
items.bridge: 有些买车焦虑在公开评论里看起来轻描淡写，但背后通常是真实的不确定和压力，所以回复要既有帮助又不让人更难堪。
items.next_step: Reply with empathy and lightly invite the user to share budget, use case, and timing.
items.handoff_suggestion: Route to Catcher if the user continues with details.
